text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet stands alone on the training track.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't understand... I want to run, but my body
just won't listen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll never be number one like this. If this keeps
up...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I know what I have to do, but... I just can't...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's concerning to see her in this state. I'd better
rethink her race schedule.
